title: BEM-536 task3 final closure
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536')
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
role_state = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
contour_status_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
done = Path('governance/tasks/done/BEM536_INTERNAL_CONTOUR_AUTOTEST_ROADMAP.md')
done.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
pending = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM536_INTERNAL_CONTOUR_AUTOTEST_ROADMAP.md')

state = json.loads(role_state.read_text()) if role_state.exists() else {}
contour = json.loads(contour_status_path.read_text()) if contour_status_path.exists() else {}
cycle = 'bem536-internal-contour-autotest'
artifact = base/'development_artifact.md'
artifact_exists = artifact.exists()

final_audit = {
  'record_type':'audit',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal',
  'from_role':'auditor',
  'to_role':'curator',
  'status':'completed' if artifact_exists else 'failed',
  'decision':'FINAL_PASS' if artifact_exists else 'FINAL_BLOCKER',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536/final_audit.md',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None if artifact_exists else {'code':'ARTIFACT_MISSING','message':'development artifact missing'},
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:35 (UTC+3)'
}
closure = {
  'record_type':'final_result',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal',
  'from_role':'curator',
  'to_role':'curator',
  'status':'completed' if artifact_exists else 'failed',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536/curator_closure.md',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None if artifact_exists else {'code':'FINAL_AUDIT_FAILED','message':'cannot close autotest'},
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:35 (UTC+3)'
}

(base/'final_audit.md').write_text('# BEM-536 Final Auditor Review\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:35 (UTC+3)\n\n## Checks\n- development artifact exists: ' + str(artifact_exists) + '\n- curator intake exists: ' + str((base/'curator_intake.json').exists()) + '\n- analyst plan exists: ' + str((base/'analyst_plan.md').exists()) + '\n- auditor review exists: ' + str((base/'auditor_review.md').exists()) + '\n\n## Decision\n' + ('FINAL_PASS' if artifact_exists else 'FINAL_BLOCKER') + '\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if artifact_exists else 'artifact missing') + '\n')
(base/'curator_closure.md').write_text('# BEM-536 Curator Closure\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:35 (UTC+3)\n\n## Cycle\n`' + cycle + '`\n\n## Chain\ncurator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor final -> curator closure.\n\n## Result\n' + ('PASS' if artifact_exists else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if artifact_exists else 'artifact missing') + '\n')

with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(final_audit, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    f.write(json.dumps(closure, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:35 (UTC+3)'
state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['curator_status'] = 'CLOSED' if artifact_exists else 'BLOCKED'
state['active_role'] = 'curator'
state['next_role'] = None
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-536','title':'Internal contour full development cycle autotest','status':'completed' if artifact_exists else 'blocked'}
state['blocker'] = None if artifact_exists else {'code':'ARTIFACT_MISSING'}
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list):
    hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 13:35 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-536 Task 3 completed: final audit and curator closure','status':'PASS' if artifact_exists else 'BLOCKER'})
state['history'] = hist
role_state.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:35 (UTC+3)'
contour['last_internal_contour_autotest'] = {'id':'BEM-536','status':'PASS' if artifact_exists else 'BLOCKER','cycle_id':cycle,'task1_sha':'f8f98110ac12be71d0286532160ebabfd46e31ad','task2_sha':'701fc5a790a90b887298def56e9356cf38690234','task3_sha':'this_commit'}
contour['last_result'] = 'BEM-536 internal contour full development cycle autotest PASS' if artifact_exists else 'BEM-536 BLOCKER'
contour['blocker'] = None if artifact_exists else {'code':'ARTIFACT_MISSING'}
contour_status_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

pending_text = pending.read_text(errors='ignore') if pending.exists() else '# BEM-536 Internal Contour Autotest Roadmap\n'
done.write_text(pending_text + '\n\n---\n\n## Result\nBEM-536 ' + ('PASS' if artifact_exists else 'BLOCKER') + '. Full internal development cycle completed.\n\nEvidence:\n- Task 1 curator+analyst: f8f98110ac12be71d0286532160ebabfd46e31ad\n- Task 2 auditor+executor: 701fc5a790a90b887298def56e9356cf38690234\n- Task 3 final audit+curator closure: final commit\n\nBlocker: ' + ('null' if artifact_exists else 'artifact missing') + '\n')
if pending.exists():
    pending.unlink()
    changed_files.append(str(pending))

report = reports/'bem536_internal_contour_autotest_pass_report.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-536 | Internal Contour Full Development Cycle Autotest | ' + ('PASS' if artifact_exists else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:35 (UTC+3)\n\n## Roadmap из 3 задач\n| Задача | Роль/цепочка | Статус | SHA |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| Task 1 | curator -> analyst | PASS | f8f98110ac12be71d0286532160ebabfd46e31ad |\n| Task 2 | auditor -> executor | PASS | 701fc5a790a90b887298def56e9356cf38690234 |\n| Task 3 | auditor final -> curator closure | ' + ('PASS' if artifact_exists else 'BLOCKER') + ' | this commit |\n\n## Full cycle\ncurator intake -> analyst plan -> auditor approval -> executor artifact -> auditor final -> curator closure.\n\n## Development artifact\n`governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536/development_artifact.md`\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if artifact_exists else 'artifact missing') + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem536_task3_final_closure.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-536 Task 3 ' + ('PASS' if artifact_exists else 'BLOCKER') + ': final audit and curator closure completed.\n')

changed_files.extend([str(base/'final_audit.md'), str(base/'curator_closure.md'), str(transport), str(role_state), str(contour_status_path), str(done), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-536 Task 3: final audit and curator closure completed')
"""
